name: TrueFoundry
details: TrueFoundry is a comprehensive Machine Learning Operations (MLOps) platform that includes a robust, enterprise-focused LLM Gateway as one of its core services. While it functions as an AI proxy to standardize access to public models like OpenAI and Anthropic, its broader purpose is to unify an organization's entire AI infrastructure. It provides a centralized access and governance layer for managing both external APIs and internal, self-hosted models.

The TrueFoundry gateway emphasizes strict access control, security rules, and detailed cost monitoring across disparate teams and projects. Because it is part of a larger MLOps suite, it seamlessly integrates with tools for fine-tuning models, evaluating model performance, and deploying custom AI solutions on proprietary infrastructure. It is tailored for organizations that treat AI not just as an API dependency, but as a core internal engineering discipline.

For OpenClaw, TrueFoundry is highly relevant when the agent needs to operate within a mature, enterprise MLOps environment. If an organization uses TrueFoundry to host custom, fine-tuned models alongside cloud APIs, routing OpenClaw through the TrueFoundry gateway allows the agent to securely access these proprietary models. It ensures OpenClaw's usage is properly metered, governed, and authenticated according to complex corporate IT standards.
